NAME

examples.c - EXAMPLES section generator for man pages.

Mode name mapping for bitmask extraction.

char * manpage_content_generate_examples (const options_config_t *config)

Detailed Description

EXAMPLES section generator for man pages.

Free generated examples content.

content Content to free (can be NULL)

Referenced by options_config_generate_manpage_merged(), and

char
  * manpage_content_generate_examples (const options_config_t *
  config)


Generate EXAMPLES section content. Creates EXAMPLES section from
    example descriptors with proper code block and description formatting.




Parameters


Config Module Options
  configuration with example descriptors


Returns


Newly allocated content string (caller must free)


Definition at line 79 of file examples.c.


79                                                                         {
80   if (!config) {
81     char *buffer = SAFE_MALLOC(1, char *);
82     buffer[0] = '\0';
83     return buffer;
84   }
85 
86   if (config->num_examples == 0) {
87     // Generate fallback content when no examples are defined
88     size_t buffer_capacity = 256;
89     char *buffer = SAFE_MALLOC(buffer_capacity, char *);
90     size_t offset = 0;
91     offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, ".PP\nNo examples available for this mode.\n");
92     log_debug("Generated EXAMPLES section (fallback - no examples found)");
93     return buffer;
94   }
95 
96 
97   // Allocate growing buffer for examples section
98   size_t buffer_capacity = 8192;
99   char *buffer = SAFE_MALLOC(buffer_capacity, char *);
100   size_t offset = 0;
101 
102   for (size_t i = 0; i < config->num_examples; i++) {
103     const example_descriptor_t *example = &config->examples[i];
104 
105     // Get all mode names from bitmask (examples can apply to multiple modes)
106     // For man pages, we only show each example once, randomly selecting one mode
107     size_t num_modes = 0;
108     const char **mode_names = get_all_mode_names_from_bitmask(example->mode_bitmask, &num_modes);
109 
110     // Ensure buffer is large enough
111     if (offset + 512 >= buffer_capacity) {
112       buffer_capacity *= 2;
113       buffer = SAFE_REALLOC(buffer, buffer_capacity, char *);
114     }
115 
116     offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, ".TP\n");
117     offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, ".B ascii-chat");
118 
119     // Add mode name if applicable (randomly select one mode for multi-mode examples)
120     if (num_modes > 0) {
121       size_t selected_mode = randombytes_uniform((uint32_t)num_modes);
122       if (mode_names[selected_mode]) {
123         offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, " %s", mode_names[selected_mode]);
124       }
125     }
126 
127     if (example->args) {
128       offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, " %s", example->args);
129     }
130     offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, "\n");
131 
132     if (example->description) {
133       offset +=
134           safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, "%s\n", escape_groff_special(example->description));
135     }
136 
137     // Free mode names array
138     if (mode_names) {
139       SAFE_FREE(mode_names);
140     }
141   }
142 
143   offset += safe_snprintf(buffer + offset, buffer_capacity - offset, "\n");
144 
145   return buffer;
146 }






References example_descriptor_t::args,
    example_descriptor_t::description, escape_groff_special(),
    options_config_t::examples, log_debug,
    example_descriptor_t::mode_bitmask,
    options_config_t::num_examples, SAFE_FREE, SAFE_MALLOC,
    SAFE_REALLOC, and safe_snprintf().


Referenced by options_config_generate_manpage_merged(), and
    options_config_generate_manpage_template().
